name: aws
description: Protects AWS infrastructure from destructive AI operations

smartRules.name: shield:aws:block-delete-s3-bucket
smartRules.reason: S3 bucket deletion is irreversible — blocked by AWS shield

smartRules.name: shield:aws:review-iam-changes
smartRules.reason: IAM changes require human approval (AWS shield)

smartRules.name: shield:aws:block-ec2-terminate
smartRules.reason: EC2 instance termination is irreversible — blocked by AWS shield

smartRules.name: shield:aws:review-rds-delete
smartRules.reason: RDS deletion requires human approval (AWS shield)
